[Blue Archive - Introducing the KAITEN FX Mk.0 Toy]

A premium handmade toy for Senseis of all ages (6-999)! Don't miss out on the KAITEN FX Mk.0, the endlessly revolving belt! Available 1/4/2323(The schedule is subject to change).

#BlueArchive
